title: primula kweichouensis
intro: Primula kweichouensis, also known as Guizhou primrose or Kweichow primula, is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It is native to China and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating gastrointestinal issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Primula kweichouensis is often prepared into teas, infusions, or capsules, and its dried roots and leaves are used in various herbal preparations.
